title: Senior Software Engineer - Narayana Health Digital - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Narayana Health Digital - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Narayana Health Digital invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Jabalpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Narayana Health Digital:
Narayana Health Digital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health Digital!
